title: goniolimon tataricum subsp. tataricum
intro: Goniolimon tataricum subsp. tataricum, also known as Tatarian goniolimon or Tatarian cotton grass, is a perennial plant species belonging to the genus Goniolimon in the family Plumbaginaceae. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its aerial parts, which contain essential oils, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, making it a valuable resource for traditional medicine. The health benefits of Goniolimon tataricum subsp. tataricum include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to treat various health conditions such as digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin infections. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and creams for topical application, promoting wound healing, reducing inflammation, and soothing respiratory issues.
